TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ya-tyen, title = Ya-tyen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ya-tyen} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ya-tyen / Athen "Si-la a kamu, őĎőłőģőĹőĪ, Low-ma, Ath√≠na,(a'őłina), kasumamadan Low-ma a kam, ŠľąőłŠŅÜőĹőĪőĻ, Low-ma a kamu Athńďnai" nu si-la a angangan, u satabakiay a tukuy nu Si-la. Ya-tyen tini i Pal-ti-cowng hay a mali, u buyu' amin ku taliyuk, tapiingan nu bayu, satip timulan a laed nu Ay-cin a bayu ba-li-lung-wan 8 kung-li, tungus caledesay a ti-cong hay a kuti'a demiad. Ci-bey-su-s sa'wac atu I-li-Sow-ssa'wac caliway sat u tukay. labu nu tukay yadah ku adidi'ay a buyu. ťõÖŚÖł(ŚłĆŤáėŤ™ě:őĎőłőģőĹőĪ,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚĆĖ:Ath√≠na,(a'őłina)ÔľõŚŹ§ŚłĆŤáėŤ™ě:ŠľąőłŠŅÜőĹőĪőĻ,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚĆĖ:Athńďnai) . nilaculan Ya-tyen u sabalakiay a tukay nu kitakit, iza ku nisulitan tu nu likiai katanaya' katukuh 3000 tatu a mihcaan. ayza u Ya-tyen Ow-cow nu sakawalu nu tabakiay a tukay. Ya-tyen nu Si-la a kezey, situngusay tu kalisiw, kung-ye, cen-ce atu angangan nu lalangawan. Ya-tyen nu Ow-mung angangan nu mikawaway tu pisiwbay. tukayay a tademaw 330 emang, cunus tu bataday a tademaw pulung iza ku380 emang ku tademaw. tukay ahebal 39 pin-bwang-kung-li, cunus tu bataday a 412 pin-bang-kung-li. Ku-Ya-tyen sa u icelangay asakaput a tukay, kitakit u singanganay a lalangawan nu subabaday a tukay. Si-la u nu si-bang-ce-sye a ziyun, nu Pow-la-tu-syen atu Ya-li-s-tuw-te a pisakamuan micudad a kitizaan. Su-ke-la-ti, Si-Low-tow-te, Pow-li-ke-li, Su-bu-kke-le-s,A-li-s-tow0ben,Ow-li-pi-te-s, Ay-s-ku-s atu zuma singanganay a ce-sye-cya, cen-ce-cya atu wen-sye-cya hamin i Ya-tyen a lecuhan anucaay namana'nel, namahiza Ya-tyen mapangangan tu "Si-bang macakatay a iyun" han atu lalayan nu tademaw. ayaw nu kungyen5 se-ci i lalangawan atu cen-cean u kacakat sakayOw-co atu kitakit lalangawan tabaki ku kalilid. Ya-tyen katukuh ayza maliwan tu yadah ku nu likiaiay a nisubelidan a nazipaan atu yadah ku nu kucungay a nisanga'an, zuma u singanganay u Ya-tyen-wiy-cen a Pow-ti-nung-sen-biyu, mahiza nu satipanay a lalangawan. Ya-tyen nu ayzaay a ziday a Aw-yun-huy a lalekalan. 1896 a mihcaan napalekal tu saayaway lekad kalaludadna Aw-yun-huy. sakatusa a bataan izaw ku walu lekad kalaludan a Aw-lin-pi-ke unukay i Ya-tyen mikawaw. Ya-tyen nu Ow-cow sabalakiay a tukay, matineng tu sab alakiay a tademaw a nazipaan ba'tu a buhang, likiai taneng mikilim ayaw kung-yen 11 se-ci katukuh ayaw 7 se-ci, macakatay malahaday taneng mikilim katukuh ayaw nu 300 tuway a mihcaan "pakala ayaw nu kung-yen 1000 a mihcaan", namahiza nina'nelan mala nu May-si-ni nu macakatay a kahenukan angangan, Ya-tyen-wi-cin mala kahenulan a kitizaan, namahiza amalahad mala Ku-si-la angangan nu tukay. makay ayawnu kung-yen 9 se-ci tu sazikuzay katukuh 8 se-ci tu saayawayn Ku-sila ziday Ya-tyen a likisi u matenesay tu a kasumamadan a tukay, tahkal i kakitaan kapahay a pitadem, mukin atu cin-tung kalamkam malahad ku nisanga'an, katukuh patize tu cin-pang. Cin-lon nu Ya-tyen cen-pang nu saayaway situngusa nu mikawaway, Pi-si-te-la-tu u micalukay a tademaw. i pikuwanan nu heni, Ya-tyen a kusi pisiwbay mahapina malahad. ayaw nu kung-yen 5 se-ci mala nu satipanay lalangawan a iyun. ayaw nu kung-yen 492 a mihcaan, Pow-si- a kanganganyaw, Pow-s i pinaay nu tabakiay a ngangayawan madmec tu, katukuh ayaw nu kung-yen 449 a mihcaan S-pow mahatatusa matatelek malacabay, kya pahezek ku kangangayaw. ayaw nu kung-yen431 a nihca 6 a bulad Ya-tyen atu S-pa-ta a laed nu Po-low-pen-ni-sa a ngangayaw, katukuh tusa a bataan tuway a mihcaan, tu mademec ku Ya-tyen pahezek. ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉŚČć492ŚĻī, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ja-tj…ôn / atńß…ôn "si-r~…ĺa a kamu, *****, r~…ĺow-ma, atńß*na,(a Ē~ °*ina), kasumamadan r~…ĺow-ma a kam, ******, r~…ĺow-ma a kamu atńß*nai" nu si-r~…ĺa a aŇčaŇčan, u satabakiaj a tukuj nu si-r~…ĺa. ja-tj…ôn tini i par~…ĺ-ti- ¶owŇč ńßaj a mar~…ĺi, u buju Ē~ ° amin ku tar~…ĺijuk, tapiiŇčan nu baju, satip timur~…ĺan a r~…ĺa…ôd nu aj- ¶in a baju ba-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺuŇč-wan * kuŇč-r~…ĺi, tuŇčus ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj a ti- ¶oŇč ńßaj a kuti Ē~ °a d…ômiad. ¶i-b…ô-su-s sa Ē~ °wa ¶ atu i-r~…ĺi-sow-ssa Ē~ °wa ¶ ¶ar~…ĺiwaj sat u tukaj. r~…ĺabu nu tukaj jadańß ku adidi Ē~ °aj a buju. **(***:*****,***:atńß*na,(a Ē~ °*ina)*****:******,***:atńß*nai) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ja-tj…ôn u sabar~…ĺakiaj a tukaj nu kitakit, iza ku nisur~…ĺitan tu nu r~…ĺikiai katanaja Ē~ ° katukuńß **** tatu a mińß ¶aan. ajza u ja-tj…ôn ow- ¶ow nu sakawar~…ĺu nu tabakiaj a tukaj. ja-tj…ôn nu si-r~…ĺa a k…ôz…ô, situŇčusaj tu kar~…ĺisiw, kuŇč-j…ô, ¶…ôn- ¶…ô atu aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ja-tj…ôn nu ow-muŇč aŇčaŇčan nu mikawawaj tu pisiwbaj. tukajaj a tad…ômaw *** …ômaŇč, ¶unus tu batadaj a tad…ômaw pur~…ĺuŇč iza ku*** …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw. tukaj ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ** pin-bwaŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi, ¶unus tu batadaj a *** pin-baŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi. ku-ja-tj…ôn sa u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj asakaput a tukaj, kitakit u siŇčaŇčanaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu subabadaj a tukaj. si-r~…ĺa u nu si-baŇč- ¶…ô-sj…ô a zijun, nu pow-r~…ĺa-tu-sj…ôn atu ja-r~…ĺi-s-tuw-t…ô a pisakamuan mi ¶udad a kitizaan. su-k…ô-r~…ĺa-ti, si-r~…ĺow-tow-t…ô, pow-r~…ĺi-k…ô-r~…ĺi, su-bu-kk…ô-r~…ĺ…ô-s,a-r~…ĺi-s-tow*b…ôn,ow-r~…ĺi-pi-t…ô-s, aj-s-ku-s atu zuma siŇčaŇčanaj a ¶…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja, ¶…ôn- ¶…ô- ¶ja atu w…ôn-sj…ô- ¶ja ńßamin i ja-tj…ôn a r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan anu ¶aaj namana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ, namańßiza ja-tj…ôn mapaŇčaŇčan tu "si-baŇč ma ¶akataj a ijun" ńßan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺajan nu tad…ômaw. ajaw nu kuŇčj…ôn* s…ô- ¶i i r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu ¶…ôn- ¶…ôan u ka ¶akat sakajow- ¶o atu kitakit r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tabaki ku kar~…ĺir~…ĺid. ja-tj…ôn katukuńß ajza mar~…ĺiwan tu jadańß ku nu r~…ĺikiaiaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a nazipaan atu jadańß ku nu ku ¶uŇčaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an, zuma u siŇčaŇčanaj u ja-tj…ôn-wij- ¶…ôn a pow-ti-nuŇč-s…ôn-biju, mańßiza nu satipanaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ja-tj…ôn nu ajzaaj a zidaj a aw-jun-ńßuj a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan. **** a mińß ¶aan napar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu saajawaj r~…ĺ…ôkad kar~…ĺar~…ĺudadna aw-jun-ńßuj. sakatusa a bataan izaw ku war~…ĺu r~…ĺ…ôkad kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan a aw-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô unukaj i ja-tj…ôn mikawaw. ja-tj…ôn nu ow- ¶ow sabar~…ĺakiaj a tukaj, matin…ôŇč tu sab ar~…ĺakiaj a tad…ômaw a nazipaan ba Ē~ °tu a buńßaŇč, r~…ĺikiai tan…ôŇč mikir~…ĺim ajaw kuŇč-j…ôn ** s…ô- ¶i katukuńß ajaw * s…ô- ¶i, ma ¶akataj mar~…ĺańßadaj tan…ôŇč mikir~…ĺim katukuńß ajaw nu *** tuwaj a mińß ¶aan "pakar~…ĺa ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan", namańßiza nina Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺan mar~…ĺa nu maj-si-ni nu ma ¶akataj a kańß…ônukan aŇčaŇčan, ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶in mar~…ĺa kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kitizaan, namańßiza amar~…ĺańßad mar~…ĺa ku-si-r~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. makaj ajawnu kuŇč-j…ôn * s…ô- ¶i tu sazikuzaj katukuńß * s…ô- ¶i tu saajawajn ku-sir~…ĺa zidaj ja-tj…ôn a r~…ĺikisi u mat…ôn…ôsaj tu a kasumamadan a tukaj, tańßkar~…ĺ i kakitaan kapańßaj a pitad…ôm, mukin atu ¶in-tuŇč kar~…ĺamkam mar~…ĺańßad ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an, katukuńß patiz…ô tu ¶in-paŇč. ¶in-r~…ĺon nu ja-tj…ôn ¶…ôn-paŇč nu saajawaj situŇčusa nu mikawawaj, pi-si-t…ô-r~…ĺa-tu u mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj a tad…ômaw. i pikuwanan nu ńß…ôni, ja-tj…ôn a kusi pisiwbaj mańßapina mar~…ĺańßad. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn * s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺa nu satipanaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a ijun. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan, pow-si- a kaŇčaŇčanjaw, pow-s i pinaaj nu tabakiaj a ŇčaŇčajawan madm…ô ¶ tu, katukuńß ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan s-pow mańßatatusa matat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk mar~…ĺa ¶abaj, kja pańß…ôz…ôk ku kaŇčaŇčajaw. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn*** a nińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ja-tj…ôn atu s-pa-ta a r~…ĺa…ôd nu po-r~…ĺow-p…ôn-ni-sa a ŇčaŇčajaw, katukuńß tusa a bataan tuwaj a mińß ¶aan, tu mad…ôm…ô ¶ ku ja-tj…ôn pańß…ôz…ôk. *******, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ya-tyen / Athen "Si-la a kamu, őĎőłőģőĹőĪ, Low-ma, Ath√≠na,(a'őłina), kasumamadan Low-ma a kam, ŠľąőłŠŅÜőĹőĪőĻ, Low-ma a kamu Athńďnai" nu si-la a angangan, u satabakiay a tukuy nu Si-la. Ya-tyen tini i Pal-ti-cowng hay a mali, u buyu' amin ku taliyuk, tapiingan nu bayu, satip timulan a laed nu Ay-cin a bayu ba-li-lung-wan 8 kung-li, tungus caledesay a ti-cong hay a kuti'a demiad. Ci-bey-su-s sa'wac atu I-li-Sow-ssa'wac caliway sat u tukay. labu nu tukay yadah ku adidi'ay a buyu. ťõÖŚÖł(ŚłĆŤáėŤ™ě:őĎőłőģőĹőĪ,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚĆĖ:Ath√≠na,(a'őłina)ÔľõŚŹ§ŚłĆŤáėŤ™ě:ŠľąőłŠŅÜőĹőĪőĻ,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚĆĖ:Athńďnai) . nilaculan Ya-tyen u sabalakiay a tukay nu kitakit, iza ku nisulitan tu nu likiai katanaya' katukuh 3000 tatu a mihcaan. ayza u Ya-tyen Ow-cow nu sakawalu nu tabakiay a tukay. Ya-tyen nu Si-la a kezey, situngusay tu kalisiw, kung-ye, cen-ce atu angangan nu lalangawan. Ya-tyen nu Ow-mung angangan nu mikawaway tu pisiwbay. tukayay a tademaw 330 emang, cunus tu bataday a tademaw pulung iza ku380 emang ku tademaw. tukay ahebal 39 pin-bwang-kung-li, cunus tu bataday a 412 pin-bang-kung-li. Ku-Ya-tyen sa u icelangay asakaput a tukay, kitakit u singanganay a lalangawan nu subabaday a tukay. Si-la u nu si-bang-ce-sye a ziyun, nu Pow-la-tu-syen atu Ya-li-s-tuw-te a pisakamuan micudad a kitizaan. Su-ke-la-ti, Si-Low-tow-te, Pow-li-ke-li, Su-bu-kke-le-s,A-li-s-tow0ben,Ow-li-pi-te-s, Ay-s-ku-s atu zuma singanganay a ce-sye-cya, cen-ce-cya atu wen-sye-cya hamin i Ya-tyen a lecuhan anucaay namana'nel, namahiza Ya-tyen mapangangan tu "Si-bang macakatay a iyun" han atu lalayan nu tademaw. ayaw nu kungyen5 se-ci i lalangawan atu cen-cean u kacakat sakayOw-co atu kitakit lalangawan tabaki ku kalilid. Ya-tyen katukuh ayza maliwan tu yadah ku nu likiaiay a nisubelidan a nazipaan atu yadah ku nu kucungay a nisanga'an, zuma u singanganay u Ya-tyen-wiy-cen a Pow-ti-nung-sen-biyu, mahiza nu satipanay a lalangawan. Ya-tyen nu ayzaay a ziday a Aw-yun-huy a lalekalan. 1896 a mihcaan napalekal tu saayaway lekad kalaludadna Aw-yun-huy. sakatusa a bataan izaw ku walu lekad kalaludan a Aw-lin-pi-ke unukay i Ya-tyen mikawaw. Ya-tyen nu Ow-cow sabalakiay a tukay, matineng tu sab alakiay a tademaw a nazipaan ba'tu a buhang, likiai taneng mikilim ayaw kung-yen 11 se-ci katukuh ayaw 7 se-ci, macakatay malahaday taneng mikilim katukuh ayaw nu 300 tuway a mihcaan "pakala ayaw nu kung-yen 1000 a mihcaan", namahiza nina'nelan mala nu May-si-ni nu macakatay a kahenukan angangan, Ya-tyen-wi-cin mala kahenulan a kitizaan, namahiza amalahad mala Ku-si-la angangan nu tukay. makay ayawnu kung-yen 9 se-ci tu sazikuzay katukuh 8 se-ci tu saayawayn Ku-sila ziday Ya-tyen a likisi u matenesay tu a kasumamadan a tukay, tahkal i kakitaan kapahay a pitadem, mukin atu cin-tung kalamkam malahad ku nisanga'an, katukuh patize tu cin-pang. Cin-lon nu Ya-tyen cen-pang nu saayaway situngusa nu mikawaway, Pi-si-te-la-tu u micalukay a tademaw. i pikuwanan nu heni, Ya-tyen a kusi pisiwbay mahapina malahad. ayaw nu kung-yen 5 se-ci mala nu satipanay lalangawan a iyun. ayaw nu kung-yen 492 a mihcaan, Pow-si- a kanganganyaw, Pow-s i pinaay nu tabakiay a ngangayawan madmec tu, katukuh ayaw nu kung-yen 449 a mihcaan S-pow mahatatusa matatelek malacabay, kya pahezek ku kangangayaw. ayaw nu kung-yen431 a nihca 6 a bulad Ya-tyen atu S-pa-ta a laed nu Po-low-pen-ni-sa a ngangayaw, katukuh tusa a bataan tuway a mihcaan, tu mademec ku Ya-tyen pahezek. ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉŚČć492ŚĻī, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

pow-r~…ĺa-tu-sj…ôn atu ja-r~…ĺi-s-tuw-t…ô a pisakamuan mi ¶udad a kitizaan. su-k…ô-r~…ĺa-ti, si-r~…ĺow-tow-t…ô, pow-r~…ĺi-k…ô-r~…ĺi, su-bu-kk…ô-r~…ĺ…ô-s,a-r~…ĺi-s-tow*b…ôn,ow-r~…ĺi-pi-t…ô-s, aj-s-ku-s r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ja-tj…ôn nu ajzaaj a zidaj a aw-jun-ńßuj a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan. **** a mińß ¶aan napar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu saajawaj r~…ĺ…ôkad kar~…ĺar~…ĺudadna aw-jun-ńßuj. sakatusa a bataan izaw ku war~…ĺu r~…ĺ…ôkad kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan a aw-r~…ĺin-pi-k…ô unukaj i ja-tj…ôn mikawaw. ja-tj…ôn nu ow- ¶ow sabar~…ĺakiaj a tukaj, matin…ôŇč tu sab ar~…ĺakiaj a tad…ômaw a nazipaan ba Ē~ °tu a buńßaŇč, r~…ĺikiai tan…ôŇč mikir~…ĺim ajaw kuŇč-j…ôn ** s…ô- ¶i katukuńß ajaw * s…ô- ¶i, ma ¶akataj mar~…ĺańßadaj tan…ôŇč mikir~…ĺim katukuńß ajaw nu *** tuwaj a mińß ¶aan "pakar~…ĺa ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan", namańßiza nina Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺan mar~…ĺa nu maj-si-ni nu ma ¶akataj a kańß…ônukan aŇčaŇčan, ja-tj…ôn-wi- ¶in mar~…ĺa kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kitizaan, namańßiza amar~…ĺańßad mar~…ĺa ku-si-r~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. makaj ajawnu kuŇč-j…ôn * s…ô- ¶i tu sazikuzaj katukuńß * s…ô- ¶i tu saajawajn ku-sir~…ĺa zidaj ja-tj…ôn a r~…ĺikisi u mat…ôn…ôsaj tu a kasumamadan a tukaj, tańßkar~…ĺ i kakitaan kapańßaj a pitad…ôm, mukin atu ¶in-tuŇč kar~…ĺamkam mar~…ĺańßad ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an, katukuńß patiz…ô tu ¶in-paŇč. ¶in-r~…ĺon nu ja-tj…ôn ¶…ôn-paŇč nu saajawaj situŇčusa nu mikawawaj, pi-si-t…ô-r~…ĺa-tu u mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj a tad…ômaw. i pikuwanan nu ńß…ôni, ja-tj…ôn a kusi pisiwbaj mańßapina mar~…ĺańßad. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn * s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺa nu satipanaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a ijun. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan, pow-si- a kaŇčaŇčanjaw, pow-s i pinaaj nu tabakiaj a ŇčaŇčajawan madm…ô ¶ tu, katukuńß ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan s-pow mańßatatusa matat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk mar~…ĺa ¶abaj, kja pańß…ôz…ôk ku kaŇčaŇčajaw. ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn*** a nińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ja-tj…ôn atu s-pa-ta a r~…ĺa…ôd nu po-r~…ĺow-p…ôn-ni-sa a ŇčaŇčajaw, katukuńß tusa a bataan tuwaj a mińß ¶aan, tu mad…ôm…ô ¶ ku ja-tj…ôn pańß…ôz…ôk. *******, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
